channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: U.S. to withdraw 5,000 troops from Germany amid tensions with allies over Iran conflict
item.description: The United States has ordered the withdrawal of approximately 5,000 troops from Germany, marking a significant shift in its military posture in Europe. The decision, confirmed by Pentagon spokesperson...

item.title: Corberán weighs two-striker option as Valencia prepare for crucial Atletico Madrid clash
item.description: Valencia manager Carlos Corberán don hint say he fit use two strikers, Umar Sadiq and Hugo Duro, for their important La Liga match against Atletico Madrid. The decision dey come at a very critical tim...

item.title: British twins discover through DNA tests they have different fathers due to rare heteropaternal superfecundation
item.description: Lavinia and Michelle Osbourne, 49-year-old non-identical twins from south London, grew up sharing a close bond despite a turbulent childhood marked by instability, foster care, and their mother's abse...

item.title: Large South Korean Study Finds No Link Between Prenatal Benzodiazepine or Z-Hypnotic Exposure and Childhood Psychiatric Disorders After Controlling for Familial Factors
item.description: A comprehensive population-based cohort study from South Korea, analyzing data from nearly 3.8 million children born between 2010 and 2022, investigated whether prenatal exposure to benzodiazepines or...

item.title: US Air Force awards long-term support contract for F-16 radar systems covering Pakistan
item.description: The United States Air Force has given a contract worth 488 million dollars to Northrop Grumman Systems Corp for providing long-term engineering and technical support to the radar systems of F-16 Fight...

item.title: Victorian by-election seen as early leadership test for Liberal leader Jess Wilson
item.description: A by-election in Victoria is shaping up as an important early test for newly appointed Liberal leader Jess Wilson, with voters in the Mornington Peninsula heading to the polls. The contest is being cl...

item.title: DOTr reports over 50,000 TNVS and motorcycle taxi drivers operating without proper franchise during government aid distribution
item.description: The Department of Transportation (DOTr) has revealed that more than 50,000 Transport Network Vehicle Service (TNVS) drivers and motorcycle taxi riders were found to be operating without proper franchi...

item.title: Parliament Approves Agriculture Budget to Expand Youth Farming Programme Nationwide
item.description: Bunge la Tanzania limepitisha bajeti ya shilingi trilioni 1.105 kwa Wizara ya Kilimo kwa mwaka wa fedha 2026/27, hatua ambayo inalenga kukuza mpango wa Building a Better Tomorrow (BBT) nchi nzima. Waz...

item.title: The decline of secure retirement in Britain and what it means for future generations
item.description: The article argues that the idea of a long, comfortable retirement in Britain—once widely seen as a normal stage of life—is increasingly becoming unattainable. While retirement as a widespread social ...

item.title: Limpopo police search for suspect accused of vehicle finance fraud involving Ford Ranger
item.description: Police in Limpopo are appealing to the public for assistance in locating 37-year-old Cynthia Kgwete, who is wanted in connection with an alleged vehicle finance fraud case. According to authorities, t...

item.title: Bashir Ahmad Questions Peter Obi’s Alleged Move From ADC To NDC Amid Defection Rumours
item.description: Former presidential aide Bashir Ahmad don criticise former Anambra State Governor and ex-Labour Party presidential candidate, Peter Obi, over reports say him fit leave the African Democratic Congress ...

item.title: TVK leader KA Sengottaiyan claims Vijay’s party will secure a clear majority in Tamil Nadu as exit polls predict mixed results
item.description: Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) leader KA Sengottaiyan on Saturday expressed strong confidence that actor-turned-politician Vijay’s party would perform exceptionally well in the 2026 Tamil Nadu Assembl...

item.title: Safaricom upgrades Home Fibre internet speeds across Kenya by up to 2.5 times at no extra cost
item.description: Safaricom has announced a major upgrade to its Home Fibre internet service, increasing speeds by up to 2.5 times across all subscription packages without any additional charges to customers. This move...

item.title: Ian Schofield claims Classic Conqueror Top 10 Shootout victory at Simola Hillclimb
item.description: The 16th Simola Hillclimb got off to an exciting start on Friday, with Classic Car Friday delivering closely matched competition and strong performances from several experienced drivers. Ian Schofield...

item.title: Lightning edge Canadiens 1-0 in overtime to force decisive Game 7 behind Vasilevskiy shutout
item.description: The Tampa Bay Lightning forced a Game 7 in their first-round NHL playoff series against the Montreal Canadiens with a dramatic 1-0 overtime victory in Game 6 at the Bell Centre. Goaltender Andrei Vasi...

item.title: Constitutional Concerns Raised on PM Shehbaz Sharif's Apna Ghar Housing Finance Scheme
item.description: The government of Pakistan has launched the Apna Ghar Programme, a big Rs3.2 trillion plan to finance 500,000 housing units across the country over five years. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif called it ...

item.title: Starmer signals possible limits on protests amid concerns over antisemitism and public safety
item.description: The UK prime minister, Sir Keir Starmer, has indicated that certain protests could potentially be restricted or even halted in response to growing concerns about their cumulative impact, particularly ...

item.title: Alice Springs leaders call for calm after child’s death and hospital unrest
item.description: Alice Springs is grieving after police discovered the body of a five-year-old girl, believed to be the child who had been missing since Sunday. Her family requested that she be referred to as Kumanjay...

item.title: Nara Lokesh appointed TDP working president as Chandrababu Naidu signals leadership transition
item.description: Telugu Desam Party chief and Andhra Pradesh Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu has formally elevated his son, Nara Lokesh, by appointing him as the party’s working president, marking a significant st...

item.title: Kenya’s push to strengthen health systems and build pharmaceutical manufacturing capacity highlighted at World Health Summit in Nairobi
item.description: More than 2,000 delegates from over 50 countries gathered at the United Nations Office in Nairobi for the World Health Summit Regional Meeting, where discussions focused on rethinking Africa’s health ...
